summary: Soul Learning Engine verification completed. Fixed critical bug where _memory_trace was not being added to Mira chat responses (main LLM response path returned response_data directly instead of calling add_picks_to_response). All 8 tests pass.
updated_files: /app/backend/mira_routes.py - Fixed line 15698: Changed 'return response_data' to 'return add_picks_to_response(response_data)' to ensure _memory_trace is added to LLM responses
seed_data_creation: Used existing pet Mystique with arthritis in health_conditions and chicken allergy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Soul Learning Engine is now fully functional. _memory_trace is returned in Mira chat responses showing memory_used (fields recalled), new_enrichments_saved (facts learned from conversation), and not_saved_reason (ephemeral facts not saved). Test pet Mystique has arthritis, chicken allergy, and dislikes fireworks.

verified_features.memory_trace_in_response: PASS - _memory_trace added to all Mira chat responses with memory_used, new_enrichments_saved, not_saved_reason
verified_features.soul_learning_auto_enrichment: PASS - 'Mystique hates X' correctly extracts dislikes and saves to soul_enrichments
verified_features.never_reask_rule: PASS - Mira does not ask about known allergies when asking about food
verified_features.pet_context_database_lookup: PASS - pet_context.name triggers full soul data load from database

bug_fixed.issue: _memory_trace not appearing in Mira chat response
bug_fixed.root_cause: Main LLM response path at line 15698 returned response_data directly without calling add_picks_to_response() which adds the _memory_trace
